};

struct FriendConnection {

std::vector<FriendConnection> analyze_social_network_impl(const std::vector<User>& users, const std::vector<Friendship>& friendships) {

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <optional>

namespace calculate_order_metrics {

struct OrderItem {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
  int order_id;
  int product_id;
  double unit_price;
  int quantity;
  std::optional<double> discount_rate;
  std::optional<double> tax_rate;
};

struct OrderMetrics {
  int item_id;
  int order_id;
  int product_id;
  double unit_price;
  int quantity;
  double discount_rate;
  double tax_rate;
  double gross_total;
  double discounted_total;
  double final_total;
  double unit_cost;
  int quantity_group;
  double estimated_profit;
};

std::vector<OrderMetrics> calculate_order_metrics_impl(const std::vector<OrderItem>& items) {
  // Connect to the SQLite database
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  
  // Write the items to the database
  auto write_result = sqlgen::write(conn, items);
  if (!write_result) {
    // Handle error appropriately
    return {};
  }
  
  // Define column objects for the OrderItem table
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;
  auto item_id_col = "item_id"_c;
  auto order_id_col = "order_id"_c;
  auto product_id_col = "product_id"_c;
  auto unit_price_col = "unit_price"_c;
  auto quantity_col = "quantity"_c;
  auto discount_rate_col = "discount_rate"_c;
  auto tax_rate_col = "tax_rate"_c;
  
  // Perform arithmetic operations and business logic
  auto gross_total = unit_price_col * quantity_col;
  auto discounted_total = gross_total * (1 - discount_rate_col / 100);
  auto final_total = discounted_total * (1 + tax_rate_col / 100);
  auto unit_cost = gross_total / quantity_col;
  auto quantity_group = quantity_col % 10;
  auto estimated_profit = unit_price_col * 0.3;
  
  // Execute the query and read results
  auto query = sqlgen::read<std::vector<OrderMetrics>> 
    | sqlgen::select(
        item_id_col, order_id_col, product_id_col, unit_price_col, quantity_col,
        discount_rate_col, tax_rate_col, gross_total, discounted_total, final_total,
        unit_cost, quantity_group, estimated_profit
      );
  
  auto result = query(conn);
  if (!result) {
    // Handle error appropriately
    return {};
  }
  
  return result.value();
}

}  // namespace calculate_order_metrics
```</answer>

#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>

#include <vector>
#include <optional>

namespace group_by_with_aggregations {

struct User {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct Post {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> post_id;
  int user_id;
  std::string content;
};

struct Stats {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string name;
  int post_count;
  std::optional<double> avg_length;
};

std::vector<Stats> group_by_with_aggregations() {
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;
  
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Post>(
                 "user_id"_c,

              | sqlgen::inner_join<User>("user_id"_c == "user_id"_c)
              | sqlgen::group_by("user_id"_c)

}

}  // namespace group_by_with_aggregations
